sections.heading: Day 1 — The South Coast Gateway
items: ⏰ 10:30am — Pick up Iceland car at KEF — Budget counter in Arrivals · shuttle bus from terminal to car lot (~10 min) · conf. #42334482US1 · allow 30–45 min · fuel up at KEF petrol station
🍴 12:00pm — Lunch in Selfoss — The Old Dairy (Mjólkurbúð) food hall · or Kaffi Krús for cosy sit-down · allow 1hr incl. supermarket
🛒 Grocery stop — Krónan or Bónus, Selfoss — last cheap supermarket before remote South Coast · snacks + water + breakfast items for Day 2
⭐ ⭐ 1:30pm — Geysir & Strokkur geyser — 35 min from Selfoss · Strokkur erupts every 5–10 min · stand on the NORTH side for best photos · allow 45 min · free
⭐ ⭐ 3:00pm — Seljalandsfoss — walk-behind waterfall · waterproofs essential · Parka app ~1000 ISK · allow 1hr total
⭐ ⭐ Gljúfrabúi — the hidden canyon waterfall — 500m north of Seljalandsfoss · walk inside the canyon · most tourists miss this · waterproofs essential · free
⭐ 4:30pm — Skógafoss — 30 min east · climb the 527 stairs for coastline views · Parka app ~1000 ISK · allow 45 min

⭐ Kvernufoss — the hidden waterfall — 5 min walk from Skógafoss car park · walk behind the waterfall into the canyon · most visitors completely miss this · completely different experience from Skógafoss · free · allow 15 min
⭐ ⭐ 6:00pm — Reynisfjara black sand beach — ⚠️ Sneaker waves — never turn your back to the ocean · basalt columns + sea stacks · soft golden light at 6pm · Parka app ~1000 ISK
🚗 7:00pm — Vík village quick stop — red-roofed church viewpoint · fill the tank at N1 station · 15 min

sections.heading: Day 2 — Puffins · Canyon · Glacier Walk · Jökulsárlón
items: ⏰ 7:00am — Depart Skeidflot — already 10km from Dyrhólaey · head west first
⭐ 7:15am — Dyrhólaey arch — clifftop viewpoint over black sand coast · puffins nesting on Lágey islet in June — lower area · 30 min

🥾 10:00am — Skaftafellsjökull glacier walk — easy flat trail from Skaftafell visitor centre car park · 3mi / 4.8km RT · 1–1.5hrs · walk right up to the glacier edge · feel the cold air · kids can touch the ice · Game of Thrones + Interstellar filming location · free
🍔 11:30am — Lunch at Skaftafell — food trucks in the car park (lobster soup is outstanding) · or visitor centre café · use the toilets here · allow 30 min
⭐ ⭐ 12:30pm — Jökulsárlón — shore walk — 45 min drive east · floating blue icebergs glowing electric blue · walk the shore · seals resting on the ice · free · allow 30 min · 📸 every angle is a photo
⭐ ⭐ 1:15pm — Diamond Beach — cross the bridge · crystal ice blocks on jet-black volcanic sand · ⚠️ same sneaker wave warning · allow 30 min
🚗 2:00pm — Start the drive back west — ~5hrs to BergOne incl. canyon stop · Ring Road all the way · sun still up the entire drive

⭐ ⭐ ~4:00pm — Fjaðrárgljúfur Canyon — natural break on the return drive · Route 1 passes right by · 100m deep serpentine moss-covered canyon · Game of Thrones Season 8 · 2km rim walk · ISK 1000 Parka · allow 45 min · ➡️ If family is exhausted: view from the lower bridge (5 min) and drive on
🍔 ~5:45pm — Dinner in Vík — Smiðjan Brugghsús — best burgers in South Iceland · or Suður-Vík · breaks the drive perfectly · allow 1hr
🏠 BergOne, Ytri-Njarðvík — ✅ Night 2 · 📍 1 Bergás, 260 Ytri-Njarðvík, Iceland · 📞 Booking.com · check in ~8pm · $263.98 · ⏰ alarm 5:15am Jun 22 — FI568 departs KEF 7:20am

tags.text: 🧊 Skaftafellsjökull glacier walk — flat easy trail from car park · kids can walk right up to the ice · free · 1–1.5hrs · bring a warm layer — temperature drops near the ice
⏰ 3pm departure from Diamond Beach is firm — BergOne by 8pm · 5:15am alarm next morning · don't linger at Jökulsárlón or you'll be driving past midnight

days.title: Königssee · Eagle's Nest · Hintersee — Lakes, Legends & Luxury
days.meta: Jun 25 · Berchtesgaden → Königssee boat → Eagle’s Nest → Hintersee → Berchtesgaden · 🚗 80 km / 50 mi · ~2h total

mapLinks.label: Day 6 Map — Berchtesgaden → Königssee → Eagle's Nest → Rossfeld → Hintersee

items: ⏰ 8:15am — Königssee Seelände car park — only 10 min drive from Berchtesgaden apartment · car park is huge but the dock is a 10 min walk from the lot — factor this in

⭐ ⭐ 9:15am — Königssee electric boat — ✅ Booked · OB6A2C80290DB89 · Fahrt-Nr. 16 · arrive dock by 8:55am (20 min before) · completely silent electric boats — only powered vessels allowed on this lake · 55 min to Salet · ~€29.80/adult · €14.90/child · ⚠️ Return ticket: keep separately · flexible return time
🎺 The mountain echo tradition — midway the captain stops and plays a trumpet · have €1–2 ready to tip

🥾 9:45am — Obersee & Röthbachfall — flat 15 min walk from Salet dock · mirror-like glacial lake · iconic half-submerged wooden boathouse · walk all the way to Fischunkelalm hut on the far side · look straight up the valley walls — Röthbachfall = Germany's highest waterfall crashing down · no extra driving · right there · allow 1.5hrs total

📸 Malerwinkel — Painter's Corner viewpoint — on the walk back from Obersee toward St. Bartholomä · wooden bench overlook · most famous postcard view of the lake · red onion domes of St. Bartholomä perfectly reflected · most boat passengers miss this entirely · free · 2 min off the path
🍺 12:00pm — St. Bartholomä lunch stop — allow 45 min
⛵ 12:45pm — Final boat back to Königssee Seelände — 35 min · arrive ~1:15pm · walk 10 min to car park

⭐ ⭐ 1:30pm — Eagle's Nest (Kehlsteinhaus) — drive 10 min to Obersalzberg car park · Kehlsteinbus ~€32 (bus + brass elevator) · 🚨 Golden Rule: immediately book 4:00 or 4:15pm return slot at top counter · 360° Alpine panorama at 1,834m · allow 2hrs · ☁️ If foggy/cloudy: swap for Berchtesgaden Salt Mine instead — Salzburger Str. 24 · 10 min from apartment · same 1:30pm slot · book online at salzbergwerk.de

➕ Optional: Berchtesgaden Salt Mine — ☁️ Weather backup for Eagle's Nest · Salzburger Str. 24 · open 9am–5pm · ~€20/adult · ~€12/child · miners' overalls + underground raft on salt lake + glittering crystals · constant 12°C — bring a layer · 1.5–2hrs · book online at salzbergwerk.de to avoid queues
📍 Dokumentation Obersalzberg WWII Museum — 30 min · €10/adult
⭐ ~4:00pm — Rossfeld Panorama Road — €9 toll · Germany's highest panoramic toll road at 1,570m
🥾 ~4:45pm — Hintersee & Zauberwald (Magic Forest) — 15 min drive toward Ramsau · follow the trail into the Zauberwald
🏠 Night 2 — Berchtesgaden Apartment — ✅ Already checked in · 📍 Kälbersteinstraße 4, 83471 Berchtesgaden, Germany
🍔 Dinner — Berchtesgaden — Bräustüberl Berchtesgaden (Bräuhausstraße 13) if not done Day 5 · or Gasthof Neuhaus

tags.text: ⛵ Königssee boat tips — ~€28–30 return to Salet per adult · book at seenschifffahrt.de 1 week before · dock is 10 min walk from car park · tip the captain €1–2 for the trumpet echo

reminders.text: Bring waterproof jackets for Iceland — especially Seljalandsfoss and Skógafoss · also useful for Rhine Falls
Late June Iceland = 24hr daylight — bring eye masks for sleeping
Grossglockner toll €37/car · pack warm layers at 2,504m even in June · check road status at grossglockner.at
Hallstatt: arrive before 9am · crowds arrive fast · Salt Mine + Dachstein pre-booked
ETIAS: EU entry authorisation — verify status at europa.eu 30 days before departure · currently projected Q4 2026
Austrian digital vignette — buy on Jun 22 at asfinag.at after Europcar pickup · need licence plate · ~€16.50
Travel insurance: Schengen requires minimum €30,000 medical coverage per person · book before departure
Download offline maps before leaving home (Google Maps or maps.me) for all 7 countries · cell signal patchy in Dolomites + mountain passes
Pack detergent sheets (lightweight, TSA-safe) · plan 3–4 laundry stops · most European apartments have washing machines
Neuschwanstein tickets — must pre-book at tickets.hohenschwangau.de · 9:30am Jul 4 · July sells out weeks ahead — book NOW
Gardena Card (1 day €20/adult · €10/child) covers Seceda + other Val Gardena lifts · buy at Seceda valley station Jun 30
Liechtenstein passport stamp CHF 3 / €3.30 at Vaduz tourist office — passing through on Jun 28 route
Pack cash (EUR + CHF) · many mountain rifugios + cable cars are cash-only · Rifugio Prato Piazza, Coburger Hütte, Olpererhütte all cash
Europcar ZRH pickup Jun 22 — confirm child seat booking for 2 kids · Conf. 738796923 · return Jul 5 before 7:55am flight
Aescher cliff restaurant (Jul 4) is first-come first-served · no reservations · arrive by 1:30pm · busy on weekends · have Rhine Falls as Plan B
